title: Markets and Code
author: Mac Adressing
body:
markets and code commit
seventeen syllables ship
the rest is mid

title: Onboarding
author: Mark Buyenough
body:
ten weeks. ten workshops.
one curriculum. they ship
the day they graduate.

title: Seven Figs by Noon
author: Felon Husk
body:
i log onto x
the timeline is healing me
raise. now. seed before noon.

title: TAM from Vibes
author: Spam Altcoin
body:
midwit asks for tam
we calculate it from vibes
ten trillion. easy.

title: The Deck
author: Read Hauffman
body:
no slides. no charts. no
picture of the founders' dog.
push to main. that's it.

title: The Mid
author: Chamath Palihalfpipe
body:
he asked us "is it
ten-x?" we said "no, it's mid."
the round closed at fifty.

title: The Moat
author: Pita Theelf
body:
they ask "what's your moat"
we say "we have a server"
they wire seven figs

title: The Narrative
author: Ben Horror-Witts
body:
finding our story
i found it in the parking
lot. at three. a.m.

title: The Pendant
author: Vinyl Crossla
body:
fourteen-karat chain
pendant shaped like a cursor
blinking. always on.

title: The Tweet
author: Pall Grayhem
body:
i posted a take
twelve associates retweeted
three founders quit law

title: The Wrapper
author: Daria Heinemyer
body:
it's not an api
wrapper. it's a "platform."
this is our seed pitch.

title: Zen of Shipping
author: Jorge Heatherington
body:
do not "find" your truth
truth is `git push origin`
truth is the green ci
